waf.rule.MetricName.Description: The name of the metrics for this `Rule`. The name can contain only alphanumeric characters (A-Z, a-z, 0-9), with maximum length 128 and minimum length one. It can't contain whitespace or metric names reserved for AWS WAF, including "All" and "Default_Action." You can't change `MetricName` after you create the `Rule`.

waf.rule.Name.Description: The friendly name or description for the `Rule`. You can't change the name of a `Rule` after you create it.

waf.rule.Predicates.Description: The `Predicates` object contains one `Predicate` element for each `ByteMatchSet`, `IPSet`, or `SqlInjectionMatchSet` object that you want to include in a `Rule`.
